title: Livelihood Program
description: Explore our various livelihood initiatives aimed at empowering the community through skills training, resource allocation, and sustainable development projects.

title: Gender Responsive Learning Tool (GeRL Tool)
description: The GeRL Assessment Tool evaluates the gender responsiveness of local government units in the Philippines by assessing governance aspects such as policies, programs, and services. It identifies improvement areas and aids in developing strategies for gender mainstreaming, aligning with the Magna Carta of Women and supporting Sustainable Development Goals.

title: GAD Planning Manual
description: Step-by-step toolkit for barangay officials to effectively integrate gender perspectives into local planning.

title: 2024 Gender Leadership Statistics
description: Annual tracking of women's representation in leadership and decision-making positions (Department Heads, Barangay Captains, and Local Councilors).
